title: Implement Kanban Board with Drag-Drop
description: Build the core Kanban board view with columns for ticket statuses: Backlog, Ready, In Progress, Review, Done. Use @dnd-kit/core for accessible drag-and-drop. Tickets rendered as GlassCards. Support filtering by priority, complexity, assignee. Include quick-add ticket button per column.
acceptance_criteria: Five columns render with proper headers and ticket counts
Tickets can be dragged between columns updating status in SQLite
Drag preview shows semi-transparent card following cursor
Drop zones highlight when dragging over valid targets
Filter bar allows filtering by priority (multi-select) and complexity
Quick-add button opens inline form to create ticket in that column
Keyboard navigation: arrow keys move focus, Enter to grab/drop
Optimistic UI updates with rollback on backend failure
agent_output: Kanban board with drag-drop functionality implemented using @dnd-kit
